description: Map the molecular interface between the D1.3 antibody and hen egg-white lysozyme using co-crystal structure PDB:1DVF. Identify and document all inter-chain contacts at the antibody-antigen interface, characterize the epitope on lysozyme, and produce a publication-quality figure highlighting the interface. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/dvf_interface.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/dvf_interface_report.txt.
